_comment: This is the mock product catalog for SaaSify. The sales agent reads this file to answer questions about pricing and features. To add new plans or features, just edit this file — no code changes needed.

company.name: SaaSify
company.tagline: The all-in-one B2B collaboration platform for growing teams
company.description: SaaSify helps B2B teams collaborate, automate workflows, and scale operations — all in one place. Trusted by over 2,000 companies worldwide.

plans.name: Starter
features: API access with rate limiting (1000 req/day)
plans.best_for: Solo founders and very small teams (1-5 people) just getting started who need core features at a low cost.
plans.trial: 14-day free trial, no credit card required

plans.name: Growth
features: API access with higher rate limits (10,000 req/day)
All standard + premium integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot, Jira, etc.)
plans.best_for: Growing teams (5-25 people) that need automation, webhooks, and collaboration features.
plans.trial: 14-day free trial, no credit card required

plans.name: Enterprise
features: SSO with SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 (Google, Okta, Azure AD)
Dedicated support manager with 1-hour response time
All integrations including custom API connectors
Unlimited custom roles and fine-grained permissions
SOC 2 Type II compliance reports on request
GDPR and HIPAA compliant data handling
plans.best_for: Large organizations (25+ people) that require security, compliance, SSO, audit trails, and a dedicated support relationship.
plans.trial: 30-day proof-of-concept available with dedicated setup support

add_ons.name: Premium Integrations Pack
add_ons.description: Access to Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, and Zendesk integrations

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately and you are billed the prorated difference. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes. Starter and Growth come with a 14-day free trial. Enterprise offers a 30-day proof-of-concept. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and wire transfers. Annual Enterprise plans can be invoiced.

faqs.question: Do you offer nonprofit or startup discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes. Registered nonprofits get 30% off any plan. Y Combinator and Techstars alumni get 25% off for the first year. Contact sales@saasify.io.

faqs.question: Where is my data stored?
faqs.answer: Data is stored in AWS data centers in the US (us-east-1) by default. Enterprise customers can request EU data residency (eu-west-1) at no extra cost.

faqs.question: Does the Enterprise plan include SSO?
faqs.answer: Yes. Enterprise includes SSO with SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0, supporting Google Workspace, Okta, Azure Active Directory, and any SAML-compliant identity provider.

faqs.question: What is the difference between audit logs and analytics?
faqs.answer: Analytics shows aggregate usage trends (active users, feature usage, etc.). Audit logs show every action every user took — who did what and when — for compliance purposes. Audit logs are Enterprise only.

comparison_summary: Starter ($49): small teams, core features. Growth ($199): up to 25 users, webhooks, priority support. Enterprise ($499): unlimited users, SSO, audit logs, SLA, dedicated support.
